title: Hezbollah fires rockets at Rab al-Thalathine, drone toward northern Israel — first since ceasefire
snippet: The National reports Hezbollah fired rockets at Rab al-Thalathine (within Israel's declared security zone in southern Lebanon) and launched a drone toward northern Israel. This is the first Hezbollah attack since the 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire began on April 16. Israel struck the rocket launcher and intercepted the drone.
tag_reason: 헤즈볼라가 4/16 휴전 이후 최초로 이스라엘을 공격한 완전히 새로운 사건. 이전 보도에서는 이스라엘의 휴전 위반만 보도됨.

entities.name: Hezbollah First Attack Since Lebanon Ceasefire (Apr 21)
